arts.ttl: Why Bayern Munich players like Vincent Kompany more
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany is enjoying a higher standing with his players than that of his predecessors Thomas Tuchel and Julian Nagelsmann. Just how much does Bild know about how the Bayern Munich locker room feels about their succession of head coaches?

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — April 8th, 2025: What’s your prediction for Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will host a very good Inter Milan squad in the Champions League today and some fans are really sweating this match. Inter Milan has a staunch defense and a potent attack, along with a goalkeeper who might have a history of stealing a game or two from Bayern Munich in his back pocket.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta's side 'receive latest update' on Leroy Sane's Bayern Munich contract talks
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly suffer a blow in their pursuit of Bayern Munich winger Leroy Sane this summer.

arts.ttl: FC Bayern Campus Round Up: Misery for the U-23s, joy for the rest
arts.sum: There are positives- Max Scholze has fully recovered from his injury now, left back Julien Yanda showed some attacking intent and strong dribbling that created some decent chances, Samuel Unsöld has started scoring goals fairly regularly now after seriously underwhelming in the first half of the season and the high profile signing from LAFC Bajung Darboe got a few minutes at the end. The back four still does not look settled after the injuries, Yanda’s left side was repeatedly targeted and exploited to score the goals, Guido Della Rovere’s magic is making itself shown too infrequently, Jonathan Asp Jensen has fallen off from his lofty heights at the start of the season and missed two massive chances today, Becker looked particularly off the pace and not much worked.

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich stars Benjamin Pavard, Yann Sommer eager for Inter Milan’s visit to Bavaria in Champions League
arts.sum: Former Bayern Munich goalkeeper Yann Sommer has established himself at Inter Milan, but he does think back fondly on his brief time in Bavaria. Another former Bayern Munich player, who features for Inter Milan is defender Benjamin Pavard, who was part of Hansi Flick’s sextuple winning squad.
